query:
-- 为现有供应商自动分配材料类型（根据名称判断）
-- 布料供应商（包含"布"、"纺织"、"面料"等关键词）
UPDATE material_suppliers ms
JOIN material_types mt ON mt.name = '布料' AND mt.erpCompanyId = ms.erpCompanyId
SET ms.materialTypeId = mt.id
WHERE ms.name LIKE '%布%' OR ms.name LIKE '%纺织%' OR ms.name LIKE '%面料%' OR ms.code LIKE 'DF%' OR ms.code LIKE 'JX%' OR ms.code LIKE 'HM%';

-- 查询更新结果
SELECT ms.id, ms.name, ms.code, mt.name AS materialType
FROM material_suppliers ms
LEFT JOIN material_types mt ON ms.materialTypeId = mt.id
WHERE ms.erpCompanyId = 1
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute -- 为现有供应商自动分配材料类型（根据名称判断）
-- 布料供应商（包含"布"、"纺织"、"面料"等关键词）
UPDATE material_suppliers ms
JOIN material_types mt ON mt.name = '布料' AND mt.erpCompanyId = ms.erpCompanyId
SET ms.materialTypeId = mt.id
WHERE ms.name LIKE '%布%' OR ms.name LIKE '%纺织%' OR ms.name LIKE '%面料%' OR ms.code LIKE 'DF%' OR ms.code LIKE 'JX%' OR ms.code LIKE 'HM%';

-- 查询更新结果
SELECT ms.id, ms.name, ms.code, mt.name AS materialType
FROM material_suppliers ms
LEFT JOIN material_types mt ON ms.materialTypeId = mt.id
WHERE ms.erpCompanyId = 1
LIMIT 10;
